cache_key.description: Unique cache key for query object

cache_timeout.description: Cache timeout in following order: custom timeout, datasource timeout, cache default timeout, config default cache timeout.

coltypes.description: A list of generic data types of each column

detected_currency.description: Detected ISO 4217 currency code when AUTO mode is used. Returns the currency code if all filtered data contains a single currency or null if multiple currencies are present.

queried_dttm.description: UTC timestamp when the query was executed (ISO 8601 format)

query.description: The executed query statement. May be absent when validation errors occur.

rowcount.description: Amount of rows in result set

stacktrace.description: Stacktrace if there was an error
